goal: Create the internal namespace package for the factory surface and route factory-facing internal callers through it without changing the external CLI contract.
constraints: Do not move scaffold or gap-analyzer implementation files yet
behavioral_changes: The repo now has an internal namespace package for the factory surface.
CLI and loop-controller factory imports now depend on that namespace instead of individual top-level factory modules.
The external CLI behavior remains unchanged.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "import chip_labs.cli, chip_labs.loop_controller; from chip_labs.chip_factory import scaffold_chip, improve_chip"
follow_up: Repeat the namespace-first pattern for transfer and serving surfaces.
Move factory implementation files only after internal callers are consistently routed through the namespace.
